subject: Video generation is live on OpenRouter
body:
Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Wan 2.7, and more. One API, day one.  

OpenRouter
OpenRouter ( https://openrouter.ai/?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

 

Hi Denys,

You can now generate video through the same API you already use for text and images. No new accounts, no new keys, no new SDKs.

Browse video models ( https://openrouter.ai/models?fmt=cards&output_modalities=video&utm_source=email&utm_medium=lifecycle&utm_campaign=video-gen-launch&utm_content=video-gen-v2&utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

 

-------------
Available now
-------------

Sora 2 Pro ( https://openrouter.ai/openai/sora-2-pro?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) (OpenAI)

Veo 3.1 ( https://openrouter.ai/google/veo-3.1?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) (Google): 4, 6, or 8-second clips

Wan 2.7 ( https://openrouter.ai/alibaba/wan-2.7?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) / 2.6 ( https://openrouter.ai/alibaba/wan-2.6?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ): 5 or 10-second clips

Seedance 2.0 ( https://openrouter.ai/bytedance/seedance-2.0?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) / 1.5 ( https://openrouter.ai/bytedance/seedance-1-5-pro?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

------------------
Unified parameters
------------------

Parameters are normalized across every model: resolution, duration, aspect ratio, audio generation, reference images. Switch models without rewriting your pipeline. Need a model-specific feature like Veo personGeneration? Passthrough mode has you covered.

--------------
Start building
--------------

Read the API docs ( https://openrouter.ai/docs/api/api-reference/video-generation/create-videos?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ): full reference, ready now

Try the Playground ( https://openrouter.ai/playground?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ): no code required

Explore the open-source demo ( http://multimedia-explorer.openrouter.ai?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ): text + image + video in one workflow

 

Questions? Reply to this email. We read everything.

 

openrouter.ai ( https://openrouter.ai?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )  ·  Discord ( https://discord.com/invite/8TpuzNXQYr?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )  ·  X ( https://x.com/openrouter?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )  ·  Docs ( https://openrouter.ai/docs?utm_campaign=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_content=video-gen-launch+v1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
